title: "8.10 doesn't fill out screen on hp"
date: 2009-01-08
forum: Hardware
---

### Post by dd000d on 2009-01-08
just pulled out a old laptop of mine figured i would try to make it work with something. Its an hp pavilion ze1230. The problem is that the screen doesn't fill out the monitor. Ihave this 2 inch black border around my screen and it is set to 800x600 res. looked everywhere for help and can't find a thing.

here is my xorg file
